zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Anderson於1553年出生在英國賀特福爾特林時，他的父親Thomas Anderson24歲，母親Catherine Hopton38歲。他於1577年2月11日與Elizabeth Bowyer在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 奧拉福 笛卡爾 也尤利 煙雨 聖 馬丁 波梅洛易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Anderson于1553年出生在英国賀特福爾特林时，他的父亲Thomas Anderson24岁，母亲Catherine Hopton38岁。他于1577年2月11日与Elizabeth Bowyer在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 奧拉福 笛卡爾 也尤利 煙雨 聖 馬丁 波梅洛易。

nameMeanings.name: Anderson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern English: patronymic from the personal name Ander(s), a northern Middle English form of Andrew , + son ‘son’. The frequency of the surname in Scotland is attributable, at least in part, to the fact that Saint Andrew is the patron saint of Scotland, so the personal name has long enjoyed great popularity there. Legend has it that the saint's relics were taken to Scotland in the 4th century by a certain Saint Regulus. In North America, this surname has absorbed many cognate or like-sounding surnames in other languages, notably Scandinavian (see 3 and 4 below), but also Ukrainian Andreychenko etc.
German: patronymic from the personal name   Anders  , hence a cognate of 1 above.
Americanized form (and a less common Swedish variant) of Swedish   Andersson  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Anderson was born in 1553, in Tring, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Anderson, was 24 and his mother, Catherine Hopton, was 38. He married Elizabeth Bowyer on 11 February 1577, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He was buried in St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Anderson est né en 1553, à Tring, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Anderson, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Catherine Hopton, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Bowyer le 11 février 1577, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Ilenterré à St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Anderson è nato il nel 1553 nel Tring, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Anderson, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Hopton, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Bowyer il 11 febbraio 1577, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Fu sepolto a St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Andersonが1553年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアトリングで生まれた時，父Thomas Andersonは24歳，母Catherine Hoptonは38歳であった。1577年2月11日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでElizabeth Bowyerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスロンドンスト オラブ オルド ジュリー ウィス スト マルティン ポメロイにて埋葬された。

ko.St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomero: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 올레이브 드 제리 위스 스트 마틴 폼로이
ko.Saint Olave Old Jewry, London, London, E: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 올레이브 드 제리 위스 스트 마틴 폼로이

ko.St Olave Old Jewry, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 올레이브 드 제리 위스 스트 마틴 폼로이
ko.St. Olave Old Jewry, London, London, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 올레이브 드 제리 위스 스트 마틴 폼로이
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Anderson(이)가 1553년 영국 허트퍼드실르 트링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Anderson(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Hopton(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1577년 2월 11일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Elizabeth Bowyer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 올레이브 드 제리 위스 스트 마틴 폼로이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Anderson nasceu em 1553, em Tring, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Anderson, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Hopton, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Bowyer em 11 de fevereiro de 1577, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Anderson родился в 1553 г. в местности тринг, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Anderson было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Hopton, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Bowyer 11 февраля 1577 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он был похоронен в местности ст олав олд джюри вит ст мартинь помирои, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
